title: hutera nivalis
intro: Hutera nivalis, also known as the Snow Huts or White Huts, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hutera nivalis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and improve digestion, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Hutera nivalis is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions or taken internally to alleviate digestive issues.
